headline: Seagate and Western Digital: AI Storage Demand Is Now Showing Up in Pricing Power
summary: Introduction Artificial Intelligence (“AI”) and generative AI such as ChatGPT necessitate the need for substantial memory and storage capabilities for the storage of extensive datasets, training intricate models, and handling vast volumes of data processing. Nvidia (NVDA) is the poster child of AI and generative AI through its GPU (graphical processing units) chips. GPUs are ...
